instructions: Bootstrap: logs/agent_kit/latest.md (run: python dev.py agent-kit) | Dynamic: logs/agent_pack/latest.md | Stable: docs/AGENT_STABLE.md
Mandatory: usage-brief → read-budget → outline/symbol → edit → verify --tier fast; ship: verify --tier check
Context: ephemeral tool results prune after 2 turns; summarize @6000t → logs/context_window/latest_summary.md
Output: compact JSON with schema fields only — dev.py --json, batch-process (see structured_output.py)
Sufficiency: stop gathering when confident; no extra reads unless contradictory or incomplete | Hub: docs/AGENT_TOOLKIT.md

cheap-check.template: Run: python dev.py cheap-check. On fail: python dev.py fix-hint. Do not read source files.

usage-brief.template: Run: python dev.py usage-brief "$ARGUMENTS". Read/edit ONLY printed touch_together paths.

fix-hint.template: Run: python dev.py fix-hint. Report output only — no exploratory reads.

route-task.template: Run: python dev.py route-task "$ARGUMENTS". MUST follow cost_tier, primary_agent, short agent chain (max 3), ui_lane. Caveman replies. OSS/search only if cost_tier is medium+ AND API unknown or user asked research. No vision/flagship for trivial/low/verify. OpenCode agents when needed: ui-static-reviewer | ui-chronos | ui-vision-reviewer | qa-free.

check.template: Run: python dev.py preflight && python dev.py check. Report pass/fail.

ui-observe.template: Run: python dev.py ui-observe --live if vision tier; else without --live. Read observation_brief.md only.
ui-observe.description: UI observation (static or live per complexity)

lint.template: Run: python dev.py lint. If fixable: python dev.py lint --fix. Report pass/fail.

token-audit.template: Run: python dev.py token-audit --strict. Report score and gaps only.

agent-pack.template: Run: python dev.py agent-pack "$ARGUMENTS". Read ONLY logs/agent_pack/latest.md.

context-window.template: Run: python dev.py context-window status. If >=6000t since summary, run context-window summarize and read logs/context_window/latest_summary.md.
